channel.title: Lyapunov Exponents on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Lyapunov Exponents on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Ordinary Differential Equations (9): Chaos Theory and the Lorenz System
item.description: In 1961, Edward Lorenz restarted a weather simulation from a rounded-off number — 0.506 instead of 0.506127. Within simulated weeks the forecast was unrecognisable. That single accident gave us the butterfly effect and turned chaos from a metaphor into a science. The lesson is profound and sober: equations that are exactly deterministic can still be practically unpredictable.
